milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17b.b — Grab handle on the left of each non-Done learn-item replaces long-press-to-drag with a visible affordance. Touch or click the handle to immediately arm drag-reorder between Up Next / Everything Else. wireLearnRowGestures simplified: swipe-left-mastery state machine only (drag paths + long-press timer + dragging mode removed). New wireLearnGrabHandle attaches to each handle; touch/pointer events use handle-attached listeners (iOS keeps touch target persistence) + pointer capture on mouse. LEARN_LONG_PRESS_MS / LEARN_LONG_PRESS_SLOP constants retired in favor of LEARN_GESTURE_SLOP. Swipe-mastery still active this milestone — retires in M9.17b.c.
